content.en:
The Land of the Sea.

Ye Tian slaughtered here, and one after another Tai'er cursed dragons came to kill.

"Die!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a ray of reincarnation light appeared in the void, turning into a whirlpool, sucking the Tai Curse Dragon one by one, and then shattering it.

This move is a supreme technique on the other side that he created - the reincarnation vortex!

The move of the reincarnation vortex is based on the supreme technique of the other side created by the reincarnation golden text, and it can exert more powerful power with the body of reincarnation Haotian and the origin of reincarnation Haotian.

Of course, this move is an attack within range, and it is very useful against the weak.

Therefore, he killed a lot of Tai'er cursed dragons with one move.

Bang!!!

In the depths of the land of the sea, an incomparably terrifying Tai'er cursed dragon woke up, and its terrifying aura shocked Ye Tiandu.

This Cursed Dragon was not weaker than the King of the Abyss Beast I saw at all, and its strength was definitely no less than that of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened seven times.

He didn't expect that such a terrifying creature was hidden here, and the ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlord was an ant in front of this Cursed Dragon!

If it had been before, when he saw this cursed dragon, he would definitely not say a word and run away.

But now, he's not afraid of this cursed dragon.

I saw Ye Tian holding the reincarnation treasure and directly fighting with this Tai'er cursed dragon.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle between the two sides caused the land of the sea to crumble, and the terrifying shock even spread to the outside of the land of the sea, affecting many areas of the entire Stygian Mountain region.

"Reincarnation Killing Spear!"

Ye Tian used this supreme technique on the other side, and every shot contained an incomparably terrifying power, shattering all matter and time and space.

And this cursed dragon is also extremely terrifying, and the curse power released is enough to make many Origin Upper Realm overlords fall and die, and one curse method after another makes Ye Tian's state worse and worse.

If it weren't for the fact that he was holding the reincarnation treasure spear, I am afraid that he would soon be defeated and killed.

"One copy body can't do it, you have to let the second copy body come over and pull it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon.

His second replica body came over, although this replica body did not have a reincarnation arcana, but relying on the top of the other side of the arcana, it could still exert its combat power second only to the overlord of the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm, and it could involve this Tai Curse Dragon.

However, just two replica bodies are not enough.

So, the third copy body also came here, three to one, which suppressed this cursed dragon.

However, if you want to kill the Cursed Dragon, it is almost impossible.

And this battle also attracted the attention of the outside world, but Ye Tian had already sent other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to block the entire Stygian Mountain Domain, not letting the outside world know about the situation here.

And other forces will not forcibly break through the blockade and come here to investigate the situation, wouldn't it offend the Lord of Endless.

So, they were just curious, not inquisitive.

......

The North Striker family.

The Lord of Beitang was a little puzzled.

"It's strange, something must have happened in the Stygian Mountain Domain, otherwise the Stygian Mountain Domain would not be blocked. And according to the Ancestor's account, there are many Tai Curse Dragons comparable to the Origin Upper Realm in the Land of the Swinging Sea, and there are even several Tai Curse Dragons comparable to the Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord level, and there is even a Tai Curse Dragon Ancestor, which is rumored to be comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened six or even seven times, even if the Ancestor is in front of the Tai Curse Dragon, he is just an ant. It stands to reason that the Lord of Infinity is no match for that one, and will definitely run away as soon as possible. When the time comes, the Stygian Mountain Domain will be destroyed, and the Tianshan Pavilion will be severely damaged. And the Tai'er cursed dragon will not leave the Netherworld Mountain Domain, and will go back in the end. "

Here's what he estimated.

But something is wrong now!

Tianshan Pavilion didn't mess around, and the Endless Lord didn't seem to have escaped.

But the Stygian Domain was locked down, and he didn't know the situation.

Another period of time passed.

That Cursed Dragon Ancestor was already injured.

At this time, this Tai Curse Dragon Ancestor sent out a truce message for the first time: "Stop. "

"So you can communicate!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Still, he stopped.

"Are you the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Beifeng Family?" asked the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor.

As soon as Ye Tian heard this, he immediately frowned, what does the Tai'er Curse Dragon have to do with the Beifeng family?

It shouldn't be a good relationship, otherwise the Beifeng family wouldn't seek his protection.

"Tai'er cursed Dragon Ancestor, I am not the overlord of the origin of the Beifeng family, now the Northern Ancestor of the Beifeng family has fallen, the Beifeng family is under the protection of our Tianshan Pavilion, and the Stygian Mountain Domain belongs to our Tianshan Pavilion. Ye Tian said.

The Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor didn't care about the Stygian Mountain Domain and the Tianshan Pavilion, it said truthfully: "The Beifeng family has been worshiping our Tai'er Cursed Dragon Clan since the Endless Ancient Era, and every hundreds of millions of primeval eras, they have to feed us the Tai'er Ruins Worm. If there were no Tai Ruin Worms, we would devour the creatures of the Stygian Mountains, which is also a set rule. Moreover, the land of the sea is also subordinate to our Tai'er cursed dragon clan, and you directly enter the land of the sea swing, which is also against the agreement of all races!"

"What Nation Agreement?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"You don't even know about the Ten Thousand Clans Agreement?" Tai Er cursed the Dragon Ancestor in a stunned manner, he felt that Ye Tian was so powerful, he shouldn't have known the Ten Thousand Races Agreement!

However, he now felt that Ye Tian was too powerful, with two clones, he had not seen any Origin Upper Realm overlord with two clones, he was very jealous of Ye Tian, and he didn't want to offend Ye Tian.

However, without the Tai Doom Insect, he could endure it, but the other Tai Doom Cursed Dragons would go berserk and kill everything like crazy, and it couldn't stop it.

So, Tai'e cursed the Dragon Ancestor and said: "According to the agreement of the Ten Thousand Clans, we can't leave the Underworld Mountain Domain, and our clan needs the Tai'er Ruins Worm, you take the Tai'e Ruins Worm, and I can guarantee that I will not invade the Stygian Mountain Domain again." As for you killing so many of my people, I am not to blame in the past. "

If it weren't for Ye Tian's strength being strong enough, he would have killed Ye Tian a long time ago.

However, Ye Tian was unwilling to do so.

"Tai'er cursed the Dragon Ancestor, it was you who first killed our Tianshan Pavilion's Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and now you are also in a weak position, you say forget it?" Ye Tian's eyes suddenly appeared with murderous intent.

"If I really try my best, I will rush into the Tianshan Domain, you will not be able to stop me!" the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor threatened.

Ye Tian frowned, just as the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor said, if he really continued to fight, the Tai'e Cursed Dragon Ancestor would kill the other Heavenly Mountain Pavilion Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors stationed in the Stygian Mountain Domain, destroying the entire Stygian Mountain Domain.

When the time comes, it is the Tianshan Pavilion that will be lost.

"Okay, I agree, but if you want our Tianshan Pavilion to supply the Tai'er Ruins Worm, you have to pay what price, otherwise why should I keep supplying you. Ye Tian said.
